S.FORM: == salaluma' == u sulit nu Hulam:結盟 6/16 (cipaka musangsang)
S.PHON: == sar~ɾar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ == u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam:** */** (ʦipaka musaŋsaŋ)
